data.description:
Multiple updates to the Campus page:

COPY CHANGES:
1. Hero/section heading: change display text to 'Be Ambitious at Fractal Campus'
2. Replace 'Want a reduced rate?' with: 'First time here? Drop by for free! Contact Crystal (crystal@fractalnyc.com) for a guided tour.'
3. Apply text-body-lead style to: 'The Fractal Campus is a meeting place in the heart of Williamsburg to do your most ambitious work. We offer 4000+ square feet of both shared office space and private offices, two kitchens, a communal lounge, and a 5000+ square foot private roof deck'
4. Above the bullet points add the lead-in: 'All members have access to:'

MEMBERSHIP BUTTONS:
- Remove the Day Pass option entirely
- Move the membership label/text INSIDE each button (not above it), stacked/wrapped within the button
- Button 1 contents (stacked):
    - Full time membership
    - 24/7 access /mo
- Button 2 contents (stacked):
    - Part time membership
    - 50 hr/wk /mo

BULLET LIST:
- Remove the 'hot desk' bullet
- Remove the 'private startup office' bullet
- Keep remaining bullets unchanged

PHOTOS SECTION:
- Replace placeholder images with actual photos
- Remove the 'Felix loves it here' photo
- Source photos: ~/Desktop/fractal-nyc-photos (move into the Dev folder properly — likely public/images/campus or wherever campus assets currently live)
- Wire up the new photos in the campus page component

Files likely affected: src/app/campus/page.tsx (or campus route) and/or components under src/components/campus/. Verify against current structure.

Acceptance: all copy reads as specified; membership section shows only 2 buttons with stacked labels inside; bullet list has lead-in 'All members have access to:' and excludes hot desk + private startup office; placeholder + Felix photos are replaced with real Williamsburg campus photos that live in the repo (not on Desktop).
data.title: Campus page: copy edits, membership button restructure, bullet list cleanup, photo replacements

data.body: PREP COMPLETE — photos staged at public/images/campus/ 9 photos copied from ~/Desktop/fractal nyc photos/ with clean lowercase-hyphenated filenames: - coworking-space.webp (was '4200 sq foot coworking space.webp') — NEW, no caption yet - kitchen.webp (was 'a full kitchen.webp') - large-call-booths.webp — NEW, no caption yet - bathroom.webp (was 'nice and clean bathroom.webp') - parth-and-norman-cozy.webp (was 'parth and norman cozy.webp') - rooftop.webp - private-office.avif (was 'roomy private office.avif') - seating.webp (was 'seating seating seating.webp') - small-call-booths.webp — NEW, no caption yet Source files left in place on Desktop — not deleted. Existing photoCaptions array (src/components/sections/Campus.tsx:92) has 7 entries — one is the Felix caption to remove. After removal: 6 existing captions remain, 9 photos staged = 3 new caption slots needed (coworking-space, large-call-booths, small-call-booths). Photos currently render via PhotoPlaceholder component at Campus.tsx:587 (text-only placeholders — implementing agent will need to swap to real / elements pointing at /images/campus/*). NEW REQUIREMENT — photo entry animation: Animate the photos in similar to the Story page. Story page uses the existing FadeIn component (src/components/ui/FadeIn) with staggered delays — see src/pages/StoryPage.tsx:236 for the pattern: . Apply the same pattern to the campus photo grid: wrap each photo in so they cascade in as the user scrolls/views the section. ⚠️ BLOCKER FOR IMPLEMENTATION — Campus.tsx has UNRESOLVED MERGE CONFLICTS: Six conflict regions exist in src/components/sections/Campus.tsx (UU in git status) at lines 296-851 between 'Updated upstream' and 'Stashed changes'. This must be resolved before any FRAC-61 implementation work begins. Flagged to human — not part of FRAC-61 scope, but blocks it.

Cancelled and superseded by FRAC-173 (task_01KTQ1VVJCVT06HCSQC44FGVRA). After a lattice rebuild this task's short ID FRAC-61 collided with an old done task. The Campus work was re-created with a fresh short ID — content was carried forward (including corrected dollar-amount copy that bash stripped on the original create).

provenance.reason: Short-ID FRAC-61 collision with old done task — superseded by FRAC-173 with same scope
